title: COOKNANO Induction Hob 2 Plates, Double Induction cooktop Independent Control 2800 W, 20 Power and Temperature Settings, 6-Hour Timer, Portable Induction Hob, Children's Lock
features: 【Independent control】- Each hotplate can operate independently at up to 2800W to ensure precise temperature control

【20 power and temperature settings】- Choose from 20 different power and temperature settings to prepare each dish perfectly. The timer can be set for up to 6 hours to monitor the cooking time and make cooking easier
【Free thermometer】COOKNANO gives you a free thermometer to keep track of the state of your food and cook it more delicately. The thermometer also has a timer function

【Safety first】- The safety lock provides additional safety by preventing children from accidentally opening the hob. In addition, this induction hob has several safety features: overheat protection, automatic switch-off, timer and pot detection

【Portable Induction Cooktop】- The portable design makes it easy to move the cooktop from one place to another and use it in small kitchens or apartments. COOKNANO offers you up to two years after-sales
description: Product Description Max 2800W COOKNANO double induction hob Heats and cooks two dishes at the same time with separate control of both hobs. Ideal for camping, single households or for quickly heating up meals after work. Fast heating and cooling Double induction hob The total output of the hob is 2800 watts, with a maximum of 2000 watts on one side. If one cooking zone reaches 2000 watts, the other has 800 watts. The induction hob heats up quickly, cools down quickly and distributes heat evenly. The induction hob measures 60 x 36 x 5.7 cm and has a net weight of 5.43 kg. It is compact and easy to transport. Easy to use Previous page 20 power levels The power ranges from 100 watts to 2000 watts with 20 levels. You can adjust the heat settings using the slider or the +/- buttons. Easy to operate Touch control with simple buttons for easy operation. Fast response: The touch controls provide a quick and precise response, making cooking processes more efficient. Suitable for pots and pans Actual heating surface of the induction hob: 18 cm. Size of pots and pans that can be used: 12-28 cm. Next page High-quality double-head induction hobs Previous page Quality glass panels Easy to clean, no fear of scratching. Quiet Turbo fan on the rear for reduced noise and better heat dissipation. Side cooling Slots on the side to allow heat to dissipate quickly. Next page 1 Front 2 Back 3 Side Free thermometer Multifunctional thermometer that makes cooking easier
